parameters.jsCode:
const apiBaseUrl = 'http://host.docker.internal:3000/api/v1'
const roomTypeCandidate = $json.roomTypeId ?? $json.roomType
const parsedRoomTypeId = Number(roomTypeCandidate)
const roomTypeId = Number.isInteger(parsedRoomTypeId) ? parsedRoomTypeId : undefined
const parsedRoomStatus = Number($json.roomStatus ?? $json.status)
const roomStatus = Number.isInteger(parsedRoomStatus) ? parsedRoomStatus : undefined
return [{ json: { ...$json, search: $json.search ?? $json.roomNo, roomTypeId, roomStatus, apiBaseUrl, internalToken: 'dev-internal-token', limit: $json.limit ?? 20 } }]
